Component AutoDetectParser.description: As a developer working on Apache Tika, your task is to understand the design decisions behind the AutoDetectParser component. You want to study how AutoDetectParser coordinates detection, parser selection, and extraction flow and understand the underlying architectural structure, tradeoffs, and implementation choices.

question1.description: What are the components and connectors of AutoDetectParser, and what rationale is given for those architectural choices?

question2.description: Which quality attributes are considered in the design of AutoDetectParser?

question3.description: What architectural tactics or patterns are used in AutoDetectParser to satisfy those quality attributes?

question4.description: Which technologies, libraries, or mechanisms are used in AutoDetectParser, and what rationale is given for selecting them?

Component MIME Detection.description: As a developer working on Apache Tika, your task is to understand the design decisions behind the MIME Detection component. You want to study how Tika detects content types from file signatures, metadata, and parser hints and understand the underlying architectural structure, tradeoffs, and implementation choices.

question1.description: What are the components and connectors of MIME Detection, and what rationale is given for those architectural choices?

question2.description: Which quality attributes are considered in the design of MIME Detection?

question3.description: What architectural tactics or patterns are used in MIME Detection to satisfy those quality attributes?

question4.description: Which technologies, libraries, or mechanisms are used in MIME Detection, and what rationale is given for selecting them?

Component OCR Integration.description: As a developer working on Apache Tika, your task is to understand the design decisions behind the OCR Integration component. You want to study how Tika invokes OCR tools and integrates extracted text back into the pipeline and understand the underlying architectural structure, tradeoffs, and implementation choices.

question1.description: What are the components and connectors of OCR Integration, and what rationale is given for those architectural choices?

Requirement Safe Parsing and Security.description: safe parsing of untrusted documents is a central requirement in Apache Tika. Your task is to explore the architectural decisions that Apache Tika uses to address Safe Parsing and Security.

question1.description: What are the architectural components and connectors in Apache Tika that are responsible for Safe Parsing and Security?

question2.description: What architectural tactics or patterns are used in Apache Tika to implement Safe Parsing and Security?

question3.description: Which technologies, libraries, or mechanisms are integrated into Apache Tika to achieve Safe Parsing and Security?

Requirement Recoverability.description: recoverability from parser failures and malformed content is an important requirement in Apache Tika. Your task is to explore the architectural decisions that Apache Tika uses to address Recoverability.

question1.description: What are the architectural components and connectors in Apache Tika that are responsible for Recoverability?

question2.description: What architectural tactics or patterns are used in Apache Tika to implement Recoverability?
